objective: Resolve npm security vulnerability for sheetjs/xlsx package.

completed: Updated devDependency of xlsx in package.json to point directly to SheetJS CDN package (https://cdn.sheetjs.com/xlsx-latest/xlsx-latest.tgz) to bypass outdated unmaintained npm public registry version containing Prototype Pollution and ReDoS vulnerabilities.
Executed npm install to fetch and install the secure SheetJS package version.
Modified scripts/kakao-kb-export.ts to manually supply the fs module via XLSX.set_fs(fs) as required by SheetJS ESM loading conventions, restoring full writeFile functionality.
Ran npm audit to verify that 0 vulnerabilities are reported.
Verified all unit, integration, parser, and linting checks pass successfully.

acceptance_criteria: No high severity Prototype Pollution or ReDoS vulnerabilities are flagged by npm audit.
The scripts/kakao-kb-export.ts script executes successfully and outputs the FAQ Excel sheet.
All regression tests in npm run test pass successfully.
completed_items: Replace npm xlsx dependency with SheetJS CDN package in package.json
Verify zero vulnerabilities with npm audit
Run full project tests to ensure no regressions
